sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current: position 4 (col 43)
# Need to fix block 1 (state 0) and block 2 (state 2 or 3)
# Block 0 is at state 5 (matching), block 3 is at state 5 (matching), block 4 is matching

# Go to position 1 (LEFT 3 times from position 4)
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])

# Set block 1 to state 0: from state 5, need 1 UP
action(['UP'])

# Go to position 2 (RIGHT 1)
action(['RIGHT'])

# Set block 2 to state 2: from state 5, need 3 UPs (5->0->1->2)
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP'])

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current pink block states:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B':
        mr = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        mc = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        if mr >= 50:
            pos_idx = (mc - 15) // 7
            print(f"  Block {pos_idx} (col {mc}): hash={n['hash']}, matches_top={n['hash'] in {'12ee96cc93cd3e0a', '598e9cbf8e60024f', '5ff2569c3387e9ef', '88e45be75860ff8c', 'b4edb3faf810133b', 'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 'd868ee08e5af84ee', 'e668cf5bf91b30aa', 'eedf8832739058cd', 'f4469c244897540c', 'fb80c9b281b063da'}}")

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

action(['RIGHT'])

# Set block 2 to state 2: from state 5, need 3 UPs (5->0->1->2)
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP'])

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current pink block states:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B':
        mr = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        mc = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        if mr >= 50:
            pos_idx = (mc - 15) // 7
            print(f"  Block {pos_idx} (col {mc}): hash={n['hash']}, matches_top={n['hash'] in {'12ee96cc93cd3e0a', '598e9cbf8e60024f', '5ff2569c3387e9ef', '88e45be75860ff8c', 'b4edb3faf810133b', 'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 'd868ee08e5af84ee', 'e668cf5bf91b30aa', 'eedf8832739058cd', 'f4469c244897540c', 'fb80c9b281b063da'}}")

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
